description.p: Through training, you have discovered a way to combine a monk's unarmoured defence with your natural armour, granting you the following benefits:

ul.li: You can add your Wisdom modifier to your Natural Armour AC.
You are no longer considered prone when using Shell Defence.

sheet.description: You gain the following benefits: • Add your Wisdom modifier to your Natural Armour AC. • You are no longer considered prone when using Shell Defence.

description.p: If an ally within 5 feet of you fails a saving throw, you can use your reaction to let them reroll the saving throw, provided that you are aware of what's causing the effect.
You can do this a number of times per long rest equal to your Wisdom modifier.

sheet.description: When an ally within 5 feet of you fails a saving throw, you can use your reaction to allow them to reroll the saving throw, provided you are aware of the source of the effect.
